text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, Fukukitaru, Happy New Year! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh, I'm so happy...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Happy about what, Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, last year I messed up our New Year's visit
and ended up going to a shrine alone.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But I didn't make a single mistake this time!
Maybe this is a sign of growth?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Why yes, of course it is! ☆ You're not the same
Doto you used to be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto has become a little more resilient
since that encounter with Admire Vega.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, just you wait. I'm going to give this year
my all!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll definitely be able to support Opera O. I know I
can, because I've grown...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You've grown, huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Shakur? Are you here to celebrate New
Year's too?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Me? Course not. I'm just passing through, but
more importantly...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Listen up, Doto. Don't go believing in things you
can't put into numbers.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Growth, feelings, gods, wishes... Get caught up in
that nonsense, and you'll lose sight of reality.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I said it before your debut, and I'll say it again. You need skill, not any of that good-luck junk.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't go tripping over yourself 'cause you've
misread the info. See ya.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Air Shakur leaves, I get the odd feeling she
was looking at me.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
T-T-Trainer... Shakur isn't the type to make up
lies. She's right—I'm just not talented enough...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, I agree! If you ask me, numbers make as
much sense as rapping underwater.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Have faith in the gods, and you'll be on the
correct path! The gods save the earth! Nothing
can go astray if you have luck on the way! ☆

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: That would be nice, but...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Well, I'll need to do something this New Year's to
win the blessing of the gods.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Trainer, what do you think I should do?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to push her so early in the year, so I
think a small blessing will do. What could work as
a cozy little adventure for her?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wow, chillaxing. ♪ Lounging about indoors with
everyone sounds great.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So it's settled! Why don't we sing a New Year's
song to get in the chillaxing mood!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: La-la-la, la-di-da! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yay! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: La-di-da-di-daa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Um, this is a lot of fun, but all I've contributed is
a "yay" so far...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're totally fine! It's New Year's—let me handle
all the difficult parts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Relenting, Meisho Doto continues adding her own
little contributions. She appears to be having a
relaxing time.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A retreat in the mountains... It sounds like a lot of
work.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I see... A follower of the gods is a practitioner of shugendo, and a practitioner of shugendo must train in the mountains.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now then! We should depart for those bitter, cold
peaks where spirits roam free!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, the rice we cooked using the mess kit is
good to go. It's steaming hot!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
And here's a really fluffy blanket. We can get nice
and cozy with this.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What is this?! The only peaks I see are the tops of
these tents! Are we just camping?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, not that it's a problem. ♪ A trip to the
outdoors is stimulating in itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pitching our tents, gathering kindling—we enjoy a
little getaway from our everyday routines.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! And did you know you can learn while you
sleep? What an idea! A New Year's blessing.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, I think I've seen audiobooks
that send info directly to your brain via
headphones.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I'll put one of those on, and go take a
nap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I don't know what to do! I can remember
all these things, and it happened so suddenly.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I must have memorized everything from the
sleep-learning audiobooks. It all just soaked into
my head.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto, honest to a fault, has absorbed all
the knowledge played back to her. I can see this
information coming in handy later on.
